'''Grakouine''' was a [[Planet/Legends|world]] on which an [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] storage depot was located. It was here that [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett's]] ship [[Slave I/Legends|''Slave I'']] was impounded by the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] after he was presumed killed by the [[Sarlacc/Legends|Sarlacc]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. Sometime after escaping the Sarlacc, he made his way to Grakouine and recovered ''Slave I''.
